subject: Simona.
body:
Dear Jeffrey, I am here again,saying you heartly Thank You for my pass and present, you giving me the best!
  Thank you so much for such a big gift for my birthday-2000$..my God,it is so much! If you don't mind i will invest it in my dream- i mean ballet- point shoes, ballet classes and those all crazy auditions! Unfortunatly, it is not so cheap to be a ballet dancer. As I told You,i am going to audition this weekend which will take place in Paris- Bejert Ballet Company. I put all my courage for to ask You one thing- could i stay for  two nights in your apartment? Never mind what you will decide i am heartly appreciate for all what you've done for me!
And if my question disappointed You, I am very sorry.
   Lots of love, Simona. 
_________________________________________________________________

Dear Jeffrey, I am here again,saying you heartly Thank You for my pass and present, you giving me the best!
  Thank you so much for such a big gift for my birthday-2000$..my God,it is so much! If you don't mind i will invest it in my dream- i mean ballet- point shoes, ballet classes and those all crazy auditions! Unfortunatly, it is not so cheap to be a ballet dancer. As I told You,i am going to audition this weekend which will take place in Paris- Bejert Ballet Company. I put all my courage for to ask You one thing- could i stay for  two nights in your apartment? Never mind what you will decide i am heartly appreciate for all what you've done for me!
And if my question disappointed You, I am very sorry.
   Lots of love, Simona.
